stem:
That the geographic center of North America lay in the state of North Dakota was conceded by all _______ establishing its precise coordinates proved more divisive.

Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
explanation: Two complete, contrasting clauses meet here, so a semicolon appropriately joins them. A colon would wrongly signal explanation, a comma creates a splice, and no punctuation leaves a run-on.
